info.description: This is the API server for BAST Request System.
info.title: BAST Request API

get.description: Retrieve a list of audit logs, optionally filtered by parameters
Retrieve a single audit log based on its ID
get.summary: Get an audit log by ID

post.description: Login user to get JWT token
Register a new user with username, email, password, and role

get.description: Retrieve a list of all BAST formats

post.description: Add a new BAST format to the master data

get.description: Retrieve a single BAST format based on its ID
get.summary: Get a BAST format by ID

put.description: Update data for a specific BAST format

delete.description: Nonaktifkan BAST format based on ID

get.description: Retrieve a list of BAST requests, optionally filtered by customer_id, project_id, and status

post.description: Submit a new BAST request and automatically generate running number or use PO number

get.description: Retrieve a single BAST request based on its ID
get.summary: Get a BAST request by ID

get.description: Retrieve the history of changes for a specific request ID
get.summary: Get audit log for a request

patch.description: Update the status of a specific BAST request (Active, Used, Void)

get.description: Retrieve the current running sequence for a specific BAST format, year, and month

post.description: Override or reset the running sequence for a specific BAST format

get.description: Retrieve a list of customers, optionally filtered by status and name

post.description: Add a new customer to the master data

get.description: Retrieve a single customer based on their ID

put.description: Update data for a specific customer

delete.description: Nonaktifkan customer based on ID (soft delete / status inactive)

get.description: Retrieve a list of projects, optionally filtered by customer ID

post.description: Add a new project to the master data

get.description: Retrieve a single project based on its ID

put.description: Update data for a specific project

valid.description: Valid is true if Time is not NULL
